questionHtml:
The graph shows how the rate of photosynthesis of a green plant varies with CO2 concentration at two different light intensities. The temperature is kept constant at 20 °C.

 

What is the limiting factor at X?

A. Chlorophyll

B. Light intensity

C. Temperature

D. CO2 concentration

breadcrumbLabels: C1.3.7. Techniques for varying concentrations of carbon dioxide, light intensity or temperature experimentally to investigate the effects of limiting factors on the rate of photosynthesis
